title: Part Feeding Wizard Feeder Orientation and Pick Region
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Feeder Orientation and Pick Region

Feeder Orientation and Pick Region

This screen configures settings relating to the feeder layout and part pick up.

Item	Description

Feeder Orientation	Sets the feeder orientation when seen from the camera.

Pick Region	Sets the region for picking up parts when seen from the camera.

Select either of Anywhere, Region A, B, C or D.

The region that can be set differs depending on feeder model.

IF-80: Anywhere

IF-240: Anywhere, Region A, Region B, Region C, Region D

IF-380 & IF-530: Anywhere, Region A, Region B
